description: Enumeration of cable construction types referenced by the cable-sizing skill. Maps friendly id → standards-family ampacity table column + canonical cable physical data lookup.

entries.label: PVC-insulated singles (T&E or singles in conduit)
XLPE-insulated singles
entries.ampacity_table: BS 7671 App 4 Table 4E1A / IEC 60364-5-52 Annex E Method E

entries.label: Steel-wire-armoured (SWA)
entries.construction: single-core or multi-core, galvanised steel wire armour
entries.ampacity_table: BS 7671 App 4 Table 4E4A (multi-core SWA) / Table 4D4A (single-core SWA)
entries.notes: Armour may be used as CPC per BS 7671 Reg 543.2.4

entries.label: Mineral-insulated copper-clad (MICC / Pyro)
entries.construction: copper conductors, MgO insulation, copper sheath
entries.ampacity_table: BS 7671 App 4 Table 4G1A (60°C bare) / 4G2A (105°C with LSF sheath)

entries.label: FP200 Gold fire-resistant
entries.construction: BS 7846 F2 fire-resistant copper conductors, mica + glass tape
entries.ampacity_table: BS 7671 App 4 Table 4E1A column 4 (single-core in air)

entries.label: CWZ LSF fire-resistant
entries.construction: copper conductors, ceramic-forming silicone, LSF sheath

entries.label: THWN-2 (NEC nylon-jacket thermoplastic)
entries.construction: single-core copper or aluminium, 75°C wet / 90°C dry rating

entries.label: THHN (NEC nylon-jacket high-temp)
entries.ampacity_table: NEC Table 310.16 90°C column (capped by terminal rating)
entries.notes: Ampacity capped by terminal rating per NEC 110.14(C)

entries.label: XHHW-2 (NEC cross-linked polyethylene)
entries.ampacity_table: NEC Table 310.16 90°C column (capped by terminal rating)
